question: What are the post history type IDs for post ID 3720 and how many unique users have commented on the post?
List out all post that are related to post ID 61217 and what is the popularity of this post?
evidence: post related refers to RelatedPostId; popularity refers to ViewCount
sql: SELECT p.*, p.ViewCount AS popularity FROM posts p WHERE p.Id IN (SELECT RelatedPostId FROM postLinks WHERE PostId = 61217);

question: What is the score and the link type ID for post ID 395?
sql: SELECT Score, LinkTypeId FROM posts WHERE Id = 395;

question: What is the average of the up votes and the average user age for users creating more than 10 posts?
evidence: creating more than 10 post refers to Count (UserId) > 10; average of the up votes = Divide (Sum(UpVotes), Count (UserId)); average age = Divide (Sum(Age), Count(UserId))
sql: SELECT AVG(UpVotes) AS avg_up_votes, AVG(Age) AS avg_age FROM users WHERE UserId IN (SELECT UserId FROM posts GROUP BY UserId HAVING COUNT(*) > 10);

question: Among posts by Harvey Motulsky and Noah Snyder, which one has higher popularity?
evidence: Has higher popularity means the post has higher view count ; calculation = MAX(SUM(ViewCount)) where DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky' OR DisplayName = 'Noah Snyder';
sql: SELECT p.*, p.ViewCount AS popularity FROM posts p WHERE p.Id IN (SELECT Id FROM posts WHERE UserId IN (SELECT UserId FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky' OR DisplayName = 'Noah Snyder')) ORDER BY popularity DESC LIMIT 1;
